violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. - Cutting board on prep table in need of resurfacing/repair. Deep cuts accumulating which can harbor bacteria.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Acousitc tiles in kitchen/prep area. Needs to be smooth and easily cleanable tiles.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Observed cutting board on cold hold unit has build up of food residue.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed handle of chest freezer by walk in cooler is missing and insulation is exposed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed cappuccino machine has powder build up in nozzles. -Observed FREAL machine needs nozzle area cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed ceiling in food prep area is acoustic tile which is neither smooth, nor cleanable.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
